title: holostigma dioicum
intro: Holostigma dioicum, also known as the dioecious holostigma, is a plant species within the family Apiaceae, which is commonly referred to as the carrot or parsley family. Holostigma dioicum is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Holostigma dioicum can be prepared as a tea or decoction, or used in combination with other herbs in herbal remedies.
